posts.text:
The war with Iran has triggered one of the worst oil shocks in decades.

Which countries are benefiting from the crisis — and which ones are losing out?

I asked @ColumbiaUEnergy founding director & former Obama energy adviser @JasonBordoff:

Video

What's President Trump's offramp from the war with Iran? I discussed with @ksadjadpour of @CarnegieEndow and Lisa Anderson, dean emerita of @ColumbiaSIPA, in part 2 of my panel:

Video

The war with Iran has entered its third week, and Israel says it will last for at least another three. What is the strategy of Iran's new leadership? I spoke to @CarnegieEndow senior fellow @ksadjadpour and Lisa Anderson, dean emerita of @ColumbiaSIPA:

Video

“We count on you, and Americans can count on us.”

That’s what @ZelenskyyUa told me in my exclusive interview with the Ukrainian President.

In part 2 of our conversation, we discussed Kyiv’s recent gains in its war against Moscow — and crucial steps toward ending the conflict:

Video

Ukraine is playing an unexpected — yet important — role in the war with Iran.

In an exclusive interview, I spoke with Ukrainian President @ZelenskyyUa about Kyiv’s role in helping many countries defend against Iranian-designed “Shahed” drones.

Part 1 of our conversation:

Video

The US does not possess infinite political capital, bandwidth, military capacity or economic resilience.

Every resource expended in Iran represents energy diverted from the true tectonic challenges defining the 21st century.

My take:

Video

On GPS, at 10am & 1pm ET today on @CNN: In an exclusive interview, I’ll ask Ukrainian Pres. @ZelenskyyUa about his offer of help countering Iranian drones & where his own country’s war is heading

I’ll also talk w/ @ksadjadpour & Lisa Anderson of @ColumbiaSIPA about Iran under new leadership & @JasonBordoff about one of the largest energy shocks in decades

On GPS, at 10am & 1pm ET Sunday on @CNN: I’ll be joined by Ukrainian Pres. @ZelenskyyUa for an exclusive interview …
• The same Iranian-designed drones being fired across the Middle East have been used by Russia against Ukraine for years. I’ll ask Pres. @ZelenskyyUa about the help he is offering now—and where his own country’s war is heading
• What can we expect from Iran under new leadership? I’ll talk w/ CNN Global Affairs Analyst @ksadjadpour & Lisa Anderson, dean emerita of @ColumbiaSIPA
• T

In an exclusive interview with Ukrainian President @ZelenskyyUa, I asked him how Russia is aiding Iran as the war in the Middle East intensifies. Watch to find out his answer.

For more of my interview with Zelensky, tune in to CNN Sunday at 10am and 1pm ET.

Video

Ukrainian Pres. @ZelenskyyUA says his country can help the US counter Iranian attack drones in the Gulf. On Sunday’s GPS, I’ll ask him what Kyiv can offer and what Ukraine has learned from Russia’s reported ~60,000 attacks using Iranian-designed drones in the last 4 years

Tune in to @CNN @ 10am & 1pm ET Sunday to watch
Why do we keep getting sucked back into the Middle East?  washingtonpost.com/opinions/…

The US is, once again, succumbing to imperial temptations in the Middle East. 

Is that ultimately where America’s time and energy would be best devoted in the years to come? 

My latest column:
washingtonpost.com/opinions/…

Strategic clarity matters more than ever in a world of rising powers and shifting alliances.

I joined Stan Christensen on the All Things Negotiation podcast to discuss Iran, diplomacy, China and US alliances. 

Watch the full conversation here: piped.video/3NhTOdllKQM

The U.S. produces the most advanced weapons in the world. But does America have enough of them for an extended war in the Middle East? I talked to @shashj, defense editor at @TheEconomist:

Video

Iran has been targeting the Gulf with missiles and drones. Will these attacks permanently alter geopolitics in the region? I asked Abu-Dhabi based @AlOraibi, editor-in-chief of @TheNationalNews:

Video

President Trump just walked back his previously stated hopes that the Kurds join the war against Iran. Why? 

My conversation with former U.S. Ambassador and a former advisor to the Kurdistan Regional Government in Iraq Peter Galbraith:

Video

Will the Iran war affect Russia’s ability to fight Ukraine? Will it change China’s calculus on seizing Taiwan?

I asked former President Biden’s national security advisor @jakejsullivan in part 2 of our conversation:

Video

How – and when – will the US-Israeli war with Iran end?

Part 1 of my conversation with former President Biden’s national security advisor @jakejsullivan:

Video
